heading: Federal agency requirements
label: 2215 Federal agency requirements
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (d) of amended .section 505 of Pub. L. 114–187section 505 of Pub. L. 114–187section 1492a of this title
amendments: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (d) of amended .section 505 of Pub. L. 114–187section 505 of Pub. L. 114–187section 1492a of this title

children.heading: Federal Points of Contact
children.label: a Federal Points of Contact
children.text: At the request of the Revitalization Coordinator and within 30 days of receiving such a request, each Federal agency with jurisdiction over the permitting, or administrative or environmental review of private or public projects in Puerto Rico, shall name a Point of Contact who will serve as that agency’s liaison with the Revitalization Coordinator.

children.heading: Federal grants and loans
children.label: b Federal grants and loans
children.text: For each Critical Project with a pending or potential Federal grant, loan, or loan guarantee application, the Revitalization Coordinator and the relevant Point of Contact shall cooperate with each other to ensure expeditious review of such application.

children.heading: Expedited reviews and actions of Federal agencies
children.label: c Expedited reviews and actions of Federal agencies
children.text: All reviews conducted and actions taken by any Federal agency relating to a Critical Project shall be expedited in a manner consistent with completion of the necessary reviews and approvals by the deadlines under the Expedited Permitting Process, but in no way shall the deadlines established through the Expedited Permitting Process be binding on any Federal agency.
